title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
